description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered and rusted exterior, featuring a predominantly red upper and lower section and a white central band. The surface is heavily marked with scratches, dents, and patches of corrosion, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure and use. Faded remnants of stenciled text are visible on the white band, though much of it is obscured by rust and grime. The top of the barrel has a small, round, sealed cap, suggesting it was once used to store or transport liquids. There are no visible handles or structural reinforcements, and the barrel appears to be a standard industrial drum. Its battered appearance and utilitarian design make it suitable for urban, industrial, or construction environments.
description: A large, rusted metal barrel with a red and white color scheme, faded text, and heavy weathering. The surface is dented and corroded, with a sealed cap on top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most legible portion of faded text on the white band, with prominent rust patches and a visible cap on the top.
description_view_1: This side displays more extensive surface wear and corrosion, with the white band largely unmarked and the cap still visible.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights large rust patches and dents, with the white band almost entirely obscured by grime.
description_view_3: This angle reveals a partial letter 'O' on the white band, with significant rust and surface damage.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: faded stenciled text on white band
